title: Trump Budget for FY 2027 Maintains Pell Grant but Slashes Other Student Aid, Research Funding
summary_en: The Trump administration released its proposed fiscal year 2027 budget on Friday, increasing funding for the Pell Grant program to address a shortfall while proposing deep cuts to student aid, institutional support, and research funding.
title_cn: [待翻译] Trump Budget for FY 2027 Maintains Pell Grant but Slashes Other Student Aid, Research Funding
